communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1. Any contract, agreement, or memorandum of understanding between your agency  and LexisNexis Risk Solutions related to the Accurint Virtual Crime Center (AVCC) or the Public Safety Data Exchange (PSDEX).
2. If such an agreement exists, any document describing which data fields or record types your agency contributes to LexisNexis through that agreement (technical integration documents that list field names or API documentation are acceptable)
3. Any document (or screenshot) describing which other agencies, organizations, or federal entities are permitted to access the data your agency contributes — including any access restrictions your agency has placed on its contributed data.

If these data contributions and documents exist, they are subject to the request,  if no such agreement or data contributions with LexisNexis AVCC/PSDEX exist please confirm and we will withdraw the request.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Shawn Segal

title: Accurint - AVCC/PSDEX contributions (Guilford County Sheriff's Office)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the North Carolina Public Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

1. Any contract, agreement, or memorandum of understanding between your agency  and LexisNexis Risk Solutions related to the Accurint Virtual Crime Center (AVCC) or the Public Safety Data Exchange (PSDEX).
2. If such an agreement exists, any document describing which data fields or record types your agency contributes to LexisNexis through that agreement (technical integration documents that list field names or API documentation are acceptable)
3. Any document (or screenshot) describing which other agencies, organizations, or federal entities are permitted to access the data your agency contributes — including any access restrictions your agency has placed on its contributed data.

If these data contributions and documents exist, they are subject to the request,  if no such agreement or data contributions with LexisNexis AVCC/PSDEX exist please confirm and we will withdraw the request.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Shawn Segal
